deviation_from_ideal_path: Ideal path = harness driving live Theia browser-mode render against booted S3 gateway, capturing real sentinels per step. Actual = dry-run because anima holds 09.T7 lease (lane-discipline blocked us from booting a competing gateway, and operator-runbook §2 boot was not exercised out-of-band). The release-gate decision tree explicitly routes this case to alpha-degraded with named-blocker enumeration — that is the contract Thread C and Thread A built. Receipt records both honest path + honest reason.
